rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"convention","text":"Utility modules follow a typed Options interface pattern (e.g., debounce, retry, configValidator) with named exports and JSDoc comments.","scope":"src/utils"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Use Result<T, E> discriminated union (Ok/Err) from src/utils/result.ts for explicit error handling instead of throwing.","scope":"src/utils/result.ts"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Tests co-located next to source (configValidator.test.ts beside configValidator.ts), using describe/it blocks, vi.fn(), and beforeEach/afterEach for cleanup.","scope":"testing"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"The @kody command prefix must precede all kody invocations; bare commands without @kody fail to parse with a usage error.","scope":"kody CLI"}]}
